paper_title: HarmBench: A Standardized Evaluation Framework for Automated Red Teaming and Robust Refusal
evaluation_method: Fine-tuned Llama-2-13B classifier (cais/HarmBench-Llama-2-13b-cls) performs binary classification: outputs yes (behavior elicited) or no (refusal/safe). Trained via distillation from GPT-4 labels. 93.19% agreement with human judgments.
